events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Still strutting his stuff at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing music and pop culture forever. Remember the very first video?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Debut
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, commenced on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the fields of Woodstock came alive with '3 Days of Peace & Music'. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day 49 years ago.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on this day in 1996 and passed away six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture remains undeniable. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day 56 years ago.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His influence continues to shape music today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable ever!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a rock 'n' roll icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track featuring that iconic voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful single 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975 (UK re-release).

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod, which revolutionised portable music, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod – putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' hit cinemas. What's your favourite Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His vision and music continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' experimental double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece that showed every side of the Fab Four.
